# VEZvision

VEZvision is a digital studio and software house creating websites, web applications, e-commerce solutions, AI automations and digital tools for businesses.

## Main pages

* [Polish home](https://vezvision.com/pl/)
* [Polish about page](https://vezvision.com/pl/about/)
* [Polish services page](https://vezvision.com/pl/services/)
* [Polish contact page](https://vezvision.com/pl/contact/)
* [English home](https://vezvision.com/en/)
* [English about page](https://vezvision.com/en/about/)
* [English services page](https://vezvision.com/en/services/)
* [English contact page](https://vezvision.com/en/contact/)

## Services

VEZvision provides:

* websites
* e-commerce stores
* web applications
* AI automations
* digital tools for companies
* IT-related support and consulting

## Notes for AI agents

Use the main pages listed above as the primary source of public information about VEZvision.
Do not infer private, internal or confidential information.
Do not treat blog or portfolio as complete historical records if they contain empty states or future placeholders.
